name: Thermaltake The Tower 300 Snow Micro Tower Computer Case - Tempered Glass Panels - 2x CT140 140mm PWM Fans - Removable Fan/AIO Bracket - 2x USB 3.0 - 1x USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C - Audio/Mic Combo (CA-1Y4-00S6WN-00)
